title: Beep Song Lyrics
stanzas:
enna pun****ku love pannurom
enna pun****ku love pannurom
enna pun****ku love pannurom
love-a endaa pannurom….

enna pun****ku love pannurom
enna pun****ku love pannurom
enna pun****ku love pannurom
love-a endaa pannurom…

thanni adikkaatha…
thaadiya valakkaatha
thammu pudikksatha…
totalaa waste-u…

enna aanaalum
avalukkaaga aluvatha..
ponaa poraadaa
past is fast-u….

vittuttu poittaanu
aluvaatha daaa
unna vittutom-mennu
ava aluvanum daaaa
thothuto-mennu ni
kalangkaatha daaaa

un kaathaloda tholvi thaan
un vaazkaiyoda vetri-ye…
ponnungala
thittaatha maamaa…
unna neeye
thittiko maamaa (2)

love-a mattum
pannaatha maamaa
avala vena vach**ko
maamaa aamaa…

aambala manacha
odaikka therinjchaa thaanda
pombala ava pombala
antha odanjcha manasoda
vazha therinjcha thaanda

aambala namma aambala
unakkaaga oruth-thi
poranththurukka
nee innum paakala
avala paakkala
unna dar darraa kilichchu
uttuttu ponavala

marakkala endaa
innum marakkala
unakkaaga oruthiya
anuppa mudivu pannittaan

athukkaaga ivala un
kitta irrunthu pudingkittaan
varuvaa… athu varaikkum
ni moodittu summa
irudaaaa maamaa…..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses a playful and carefree attitude towards love and relationships, emphasizing fun and enjoyment.

What is the plot context of the movie Beep?

The movie revolves around themes of love and friendship, showcasing the ups and downs of youthful romance.

Who is the singer and music director of Beep Song?

The song is sung by Simbu and composed by Anirudh.

When was Beep Song released?

The song was released on December 11, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The Beep Song serves as a lively anthem that encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth. It conveys a sense of joy and excitement, making it perfect for celebrations and parties. The catchy lyrics and upbeat rhythm evoke feelings of happiness and energy, inviting listeners to dance along. In the context of the movie Beep, it highlights the playful dynamics of love and friendship.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Beep Song from Beep is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Simbu's vibrant vocals and Anirudh's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the fun and energy that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: We are in love with this girl, we are in love with this girl, we are in love with this girl, what kind of love are we doing...
We are doing love to feel happy, she is also doing it to take away happiness.
Don't scold the girls, you should scold yourself. Come on... beep... come on... beep...
We are in love with this girl, we are in love with this girl, we are in love with this girl, what kind of love are we doing...
Don't drink too much... don't waste your time on things you don't like... totally a waste...
No matter what, for her, it's all about the past... the past is fast...
She left and went away, but you shouldn't forget her, she left us, but you shouldn't forget her either.
Your love's failure is your life's success... don't scold the girls, you should scold yourself.
Don't just love her, you should keep her close...
Come on... beep... come on... beep...
If you understand the girl's mind, you will know how to live with her mind.
In our world, for you, a girl was born, you still haven't seen her, you are just wasting time and missing her.
Don't forget, don't forget, a girl was sent for you, she has made a decision.
Because of that, she will come to you... until then, just stay quiet and relax...
